🧵 I'm writing a 100-part SwiftUI series: Zero to Expert

67 parts published so far. Here's the journey from Part 1 👇

Full list:
https://medium.com/@21zerixpm/list/100daysswiftuitoexpert-069dcb77c2d2

#SwiftUI #iOS #100DaysOfCode

📱 Part 1 — Why SwiftUI is the Future of iOS Development

Declarative UI, live previews, cross-platform (iOS, macOS, watchOS, tvOS). If you're still on UIKit, it's time.

#SwiftUI #iOSDev

🧱 Part 2 — Understanding SwiftUI Views

Everything is a View. Text, Image, Button — they're all structs conforming to the View protocol. The building blocks of every app.

#SwiftUI #iOSDev

🎨 Part 3 — Mastering SwiftUI Modifiers

.padding(), .background(), .font() — order matters! Modifiers wrap views in new views. Understanding this changes everything.

#SwiftUI

📐 Part 4 — Layout System Deep Dive

HStack, VStack, ZStack, LazyVGrid, LazyHGrid. SwiftUI's layout is powerful once you understand how parent-child negotiation works.

#SwiftUI

🎨 Part 5 — Colors and Gradients

LinearGradient, RadialGradient, AngularGradient + Color assets + dark mode support. Make your UI pop.

#SwiftUI #Design

🔣 Part 6 — SF Symbols Mastery

5000+ built-in icons that scale perfectly with Dynamic Type. symbolEffect(), hierarchical rendering, variable colors.

#SwiftUI #SFSymbols

🖼️ Part 7 — Working with Images and Media

AsyncImage, resizable(), aspectRatio(), PhotosPicker. Loading, caching, and displaying media the SwiftUI way.

#SwiftUI

✏️ Part 8 — Text and Fonts in SwiftUI

Custom fonts, Dynamic Type, AttributedString, markdown support. Typography that adapts and scales beautifully.

#SwiftUI

🔘 Part 9 — Buttons and Controls

Button, Toggle, Slider, Stepper, Picker, DatePicker. Building interactive UIs with built-in controls.

#SwiftUI #iOSDev

📝 Part 10 — TextField and Forms

TextField, SecureField, TextEditor, Form, Section. Mastering user input with validation and keyboard management.

#SwiftUI
